title: Physicians Realty Trust Is Much Safer Than It Looks
text: Physicians Realty Trust has a stable and safe investment profile, with a focus on outpatient transition in healthcare and investment-grade tenants. Despite recent trends not impacting the company's safety, its projected FFO growth remains low, raising questions about its valuation in an inflationary environment. DOC outperforms competitors in terms of fundamentals, with low debt and strong tenant performance monitoring, making it an attractive long-term investment option.

title: Great Time To Own These REITs - Brad Thomas With Kirk Spano
text: Brad Thomas talks to Kirk Spano about REITs and real estate investing. Are industrial REITs underappreciated and which US regions look the best?

title: Elon Musk Says Home Prices Will Plummet -- But This Type of Real Estate is Practically Minting Money for Investors
text: Musk predicts that housing prices will fall, although some disagree with his view. One area of real estate is proving to be especially resilient.
